description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden stock and foregrip, complemented by a dark metal receiver and barrel assembly. The stock is solid and extends to a slightly curved buttplate, providing stability and comfort for the user. The barrel is cylindrical and features a perforated heat shield or shroud, likely for cooling and grip. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the main body, with the magazine appearing to be internal or flush with the receiver. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The overall finish is a combination of polished wood and matte black metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock, dark metal barrel, and integrated iron sights, featuring a perforated barrel shroud and a robust, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the muzzle, barrel shroud, and a narrow profile of the wooden stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the wooden stock, receiver, and perforated barrel shroud.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, trigger area, and the full length of the barrel with its shroud.
